mapper.select:
SELECT id,user_id,username,start_time,end_time,img_url,departure_addr,destination_addr,reason,remark,status, vehicle_id,reject_reason,create_time,update_time FROM application
AND user_id = #{userId}
AND status = #{status}
AND departure_addr LIKE CONCAT('%',#{departureAddr},'%')
AND destination_addr LIKE CONCAT('%',#{destinationAddr},'%')
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%',#{username},'%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update:
update application
status = #{application.status},
update_time = #{application.updateTime},
vehicle_id = null
where id=#{application.id} and status=#{expectStatus}
